issues.description: Effect text describes a complex triggered ability with duration conditions, but effects[] is empty. Should contain: (1) An OnKO trigger for opponent's Character KO'd with duration DuringOpponentTurn, (2) A cost to trash 2 cards from hand (Once Per Turn), (3) An action to set this Leader as active. Duration '[Your Turn]' at start indicates this effect is limited to your turn.
Effect text contains '[Your Turn]' which indicates the triggered ability should only function during your turn. This requires proper duration handling in the DSL structure.
[Once Per Turn] restriction and 'trash 2 cards from your hand' cost are not represented in DSL.
